inputs.userGoal: Create a real-time document Q&A API using Azure OpenAI and Azure Cosmos DB, expose it through Azure API Management, and enforce per-user rate limits.

reasoning.whyChosen: Provides centralized logs/metrics for API, APIM, and runtime diagnostics to support reliability and operations.
reasoning.tradeoffs: Single workspace lowers operational overhead but increases shared blast radius for retention/cost settings.

references.title: Azure Monitor Logs - Log Analytics workspace

resources.name: appi-docqa-api-prod-eus

reasoning.whyChosen: Gives end-to-end API telemetry and request tracing for troubleshooting latency and failures.
reasoning.tradeoffs: Improves observability at extra ingestion/storage cost.

resources.dependencyReasoning: Workspace-based Application Insights requires Log Analytics workspace linkage.

reasoning.whyChosen: Enables secretless auth from API runtime to Azure OpenAI, Cosmos DB, and Key Vault via RBAC.
reasoning.tradeoffs: User-assigned identity adds one more resource but improves identity lifecycle control.

reasoning.whyChosen: Stores non-MI secrets/config values (if needed) and supports secure configuration management.
reasoning.tradeoffs: Adds operational dependency but improves secret governance and rotation posture.

reasoning.whyChosen: Provides hosted LLM inference for document Q&A generation with enterprise controls.
alternativesConsidered: Azure AI Foundry serverless model endpoints
reasoning.tradeoffs: Strong Azure integration but requires deployment quota and regional model availability checks.

resources.name: aoai-docqa-prod-eus-gpt4o-mini

reasoning.whyChosen: Balanced latency/cost profile suitable for real-time Q&A API response streaming.
reasoning.tradeoffs: Lower cost and faster responses than larger models, with potential quality tradeoff on complex reasoning.

resources.dependencyReasoning: Model deployment is a child resource of Azure OpenAI account.

reasoning.whyChosen: Stores document metadata, chat sessions, and retrieval context with low-latency JSON access.
reasoning.tradeoffs: Serverless simplifies low-volume start but can become more expensive at sustained high throughput.

references.title: Azure Cosmos DB for NoSQL overview

reasoning.whyChosen: Provides managed API gateway, authentication policy enforcement, and per-user throttling.
alternativesConsidered: Azure Front Door + custom API gateway logic
reasoning.tradeoffs: Higher gateway cost than lightweight alternatives, but richer policy and lifecycle management.

resources.name: acaenv-docqa-prod-eus

reasoning.whyChosen: Provides autoscaled container runtime suitable for stateless, low-latency Q&A API workloads.
reasoning.tradeoffs: Operationally simpler than AKS; fewer deep orchestration controls than Kubernetes.

resources.dependencyReasoning: Container Apps environment is configured to send logs to Log Analytics.

resources.name: aca-docqa-api-prod-eus

reasoning.whyChosen: Hosts the real-time Q&A API with managed autoscaling and supports token-streaming responses.
reasoning.tradeoffs: Simpler operations than AKS, but less control for advanced networking/runtime tuning.

resources.dependencyReasoning: API runtime requires hosting environment, identity, model endpoint, data store, secret/config source, and telemetry.

overallReasoning.summary: This architecture uses API Management as the public gateway, a Container Apps-hosted Q&A API for real-time responses, Azure OpenAI for generation, and Cosmos DB for conversation/document data, with managed identity, Key Vault, and centralized observability for secure operations.
overallReasoning.tradeoffs: The design prioritizes managed services and speed of delivery over maximum runtime/network customization; APIM and observability add cost but provide strong governance and operational control.

plan.validation: Dependencies are ordered so platform services (identity, observability, data, AI) are provisioned before API runtime and gateway policy configuration.
architecturePrinciples: Secure by default with managed identity and RBAC
Operational visibility with centralized logs and traces
Elastic scaling for low-latency real-time responses
